nodes.name: Tachyspiza
nodes.summary: Tachyspiza（Tachyspiza）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Frances's sparrowhawk、Spot-tailed sparrowhawk、Grey-headed goshawk等27种鸟类。

nodes.name: Slaty-mantled goshawk
nodes.summary: The slaty-mantled goshawk (Tachyspiza luteoschistacea), also known as the slaty-mantled sparrowhawk or slaty-backed sparrowhawk, is a species of bird of prey in the family Accipitridae. It was formerly placed in the genus Accipiter. It is threatened by habitat loss. It is endemic to the Bismarck Archipelago (Papua New Guinea). Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References BirdLife Species Factsheet.
